title: Best Absurdly Random Evangelion Merch Ever
display_title: Best Absurdly Random Evangelion Merch Ever
wikitext:
[]: Best Absurdly Random Evangelion Merch Ever?             Quote Post by Killericon » Mon Jan 04, 2010 3:28 am My vote is for this bottle of wine I spotted in Tokyo. [URL=http://img684.imageshack.us/i/tokyo028.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 04, 2010 3:51 am Reposting: Here are some of the more outlandish ones: Ninja figures (believe it) Chinese police figures Kanned Koffee Rapey-Time Asuka The last two are still available on the official site, but currently sold out (for obvious reasons).

[]:             Quote Post by Killericon » Mon Jan 04, 2010 3:55 am Oh, my bad. Should we merge?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 04, 2010 4:03 am The threads aren't exactly the same, but my response to both threads is.

[]:             Quote Post by Killericon » Mon Jan 04, 2010 4:07 am I looked on the EVAstore page, and almost immediately found something that wins. This bitchin' Rei Stratocaster makes me think that both documenting all Eva merch and trying to find the most absurd EVA merch as equally foolish tasks that cannot be completed. LOOK AT THE LANCE DOWN THE NECK!!

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Mon Jan 04, 2010 4:20 am alcohol wipes http://en.item.rakuten.com/cinemacollection/jt-021904/ automotive wheel nuts http://en.item.rakuten.com/bee/10001900/ humidifier http://www.hlj.com/product/MOV01260 and as far as figures go the most random ones I've seen are mermaid Rei and Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Jan 04, 2010 4:25 am [insert Rebuild joke here]

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 04, 2010 8:13 am I think the humidifier was pretty awful.

[]:             Quote Post by Killericon » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:03 am [URL=http://img689.imageshack.us/i/holyshitat.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:07 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I think the humidifier was pretty awful.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:09 am

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:13 am I think samaeloos entry wins, WTF were they thinking making that? See this is why I stopped collecting eva merchandise...

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:15 am A classic, Eva dinnerware:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:27 am Fazmotron wrote: A classic, Eva dinnerware:

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Jan 04, 2010 10:29 am Yeah, I know, but seeing as though Unit-01 hair machine made an appearance, I thought this deserved one also.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Jan 04, 2010 9:52 pm NAveryW wrote: Chinese police figures

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Jan 04, 2010 11:12 pm I want the rapey Asuka figure But the bond girls Rei and Asuka are nice too DO WANT!

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Tue Jan 05, 2010 11:49 am I kinda want ninja-Rei...

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Jan 05, 2010 1:35 pm giuliano wrote: I kinda want ninja-Rei...

[]:             Quote Post by Killericon » Tue Jan 05, 2010 9:33 pm Rei has an Ocarina and Asuka's hanging out with Nemo.
